jp.title: ASCII.jp：『アーケロン（Arkheron）』のCBTプレイ権をひとりにつき3枚配布中！フレンドに配って一緒に遊ぼう
有害鳥獣捕獲のため巡回中の40代のハンターの男性がクマに襲われ重傷「素手で目を潰した」激しく抵抗し格闘しながら発砲して仕留めたか 役場が状況を説明 北海道更別村
jp.description:
18日夕方、北海道更別村でハンターの男性がクマに襲われけがをしました。
更別村によりますと、18日午後6時45分ごろ、更別村更南の山林で40代の男性が
クマに襲われました。
男性は、地元の猟友会

world.title: Ninety Kākāpō, Including New Chicks, To Be Vaccinated Against Bird Flu
world.description: The Kākāpō Recovery Programme is positive about the vaccination programme rolling out, as the deadly bird flu arrives on our shores.

world.title: Heat will give way to thunderstorms: temperatures in Latvia will rise to nearly +30 degrees
world.description: In the morning, sunny weather will predominantly remain in the eastern part of the country. The western and central regions will have more clouds, and by the afternoon, cloud cover will begin to spread across Latvia.

world.title: LTFRB caps booking fees for app-based taxi services
world.description: MANILA, Philippines -- The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has approved a new policy capping the booking or platform fees that may be charged by app-based taxi services, setting the maximum at 20 percent of the approved taxi fare or P60, whichever is lower.
